message:
fix(core,vdbe): support DML in prepare() and COALESCE(aggregate) without GROUP BY

- prepare() now accepts INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE statements (GH-11).
  DML PreparedStatements store the parsed AST and are executed through
  Connection::execute_prepared[_with_params], which dispatches through
  the full Connection execution pipeline (triggers, constraints, autocommit).

- COALESCE/IFNULL wrapping aggregate functions without GROUP BY now works
  (GH-10). The codegen extracts the inner aggregate, compiles it normally,
  and applies a null-coalescing wrapper via NotNull/emit_expr after AggFinal.

Fixes #10, fixes #11.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
